title: Black Market Sales
query: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(TotalSale), 0) AS total, COUNT(*) AS sales FROM MarketSell WHERE IllegalGoods = 1 AND event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate
detailQuery: SELECT COALESCE(Type_Localised, Type) AS label, SUM(TotalSale) AS value FROM MarketSell WHERE IllegalGoods = 1 AND event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate GROUP BY label ORDER BY value DESC

details.text: {sales} illegal commodity sale(s) totalling {total} Cr across black markets during the report period. Contraband runs are the dark side of trading — each sale required finding a station that didn't ask too many questions.
details.help: IllegalGoods = 1 flags contraband sales. total drives the title. Bar chart shows which illegal commodities generated the most revenue.

tagLines: Contraband transaction records sealed. The relevant authorities are advised these logs are encrypted.
The black market doesn't advertise. You found it anyway. Repeatedly.
Not all cargo manifests bear scrutiny. These ones especially.
